outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility risk: negative weekly/monthly GEX (-0.83B/-3.76B) amplifies downside moves if 655 support breaks
outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning with PCR 1.49-4.00 and smirk skew (1.29-1.40) across all expiries. Spot at 659.22 sits just above 0DTE Max Pain (655), creating magnetic pull. Heavy put walls at 630/640/650/655 provide layered support. Call resistance at 660/675. Dealers likely defend 655 zone as pin target.

levels.motivazione: Massive put OI across ALL expiries (10K/112K/145K). Deepest structural anchor with extreme bearish positioning.
Dominant call OI across ALL expiries (6.2K/17.9K/19K). Primary upside cap aligned with dealer hedging.
0DTE Max Pain aligns with Weekly (656). Heavy put OI (7.5K/19.6K/46.8K). Pin risk target for dealers.
Strong put concentration across all expiries (7.1K/23.6K/72.5K). Critical secondary support above 640/630.
Highest Weekly call OI (19.7K) + Monthly presence (9.8K). Immediate resistance just above spot.
0DTE gamma inflection point. Above this level, dealer hedging flips from suppressive to amplifying.
Heavy put accumulation (8.7K/96.7K/98.5K). Mid-tier support between 650 and 630 anchors.
